visual_intent: cloud-white card structure with mist-blue atmosphere
slightly more intellectual tone than the March 23 post
brand_guardrails: retain the approved Education White Card mode
avoid exact reuse of the March 23 card layout
no direct efficacy claims or dramatic science visuals
match mood, palette, light quality, whitespace, and restraint from the selected references without duplicating exact crop, pose, object placement, or gradient pattern
composition: white card structure as the dominant mode
slightly offset editorial layout rather than perfectly centered
text-first educational layout with premium readability
reference_strategy: Use the approved March 23 working example as the benchmark for the Education White Card mode, then use education-layout for spacing discipline and cool-palette for atmosphere. Keep the card language consistent while shifting the composition and abstract cue so this reads as a new post.
variation_guardrails: do not copy the exact March 23 type placement or object shape
shift the card rhythm toward a slightly more editorial offset layout
keep the science cue softer and more ingredient-like than cellular
maintain the same premium calm while increasing the sense of thoughtful structure

slides_ja: エピカテキンは、Mitozzの考え方を理解するうえで大切な成分です。
成分名だけを見ると難しく感じても、まずは役割の輪郭を知ることが大切です。
大切なのは、言葉の難しさではなく、どう位置づけるかという視点です。
まずは基礎から整理することで、ブランドの見え方も変わります。
保存して、あとで見返せる成分の基礎知識として役立ててください。

reference_files: brand/references/business-context/strategy/Mitozz Japan Brand Voice And Messaging Guidelines.docx.pdf
notes: March 27 ingredient education carousel. Stay inside the approved Education White Card mode established on March 23, but shift toward a more ingredient-focused, slightly more intellectual presentation with a more offset editorial rhythm.
